creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
On Fri, Jul 27, 2007 at 17:50:08 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/mutt-devel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/114971 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114971

This is fixed (among other things) by ports/115109.

Best regards / Mit freundlichen Grüßen
